Cliente - Class in co.edu.unbosque.cliente.model
JPA entity representing a client record stored in the clientes database table.

co.edu.unbosque.cliente - package co.edu.unbosque.cliente
Package containing the main entry point for the client service application.

Package containing REST controllers for client management.

Domain model classes representing database entities for the client microservice.

Package containing service classes for client management.
crear(Cliente) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.cliente.controller.ClienteController
POST /crear - create a new client record.
crear(Cliente) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.cliente.service.ClienteService
Persist a new client, verifying that the cedula is not already used.
crear(T) - Method in interface co.edu.unbosque.cliente.service.CRUDOperations
Create a new record for the given entity.

Generic interface defining basic CRUD operations that service classes implement for their corresponding domain entities.
